description.en: A giant deep-sea relative of the common woodlouse that can grow up to 40 cm long.
description.zh: 普通西瓜虫的深海巨型亲戚，身长可达 40 厘米。

anatomy.en: They have a hard exoskeleton with overlapping segments and 14 jointed legs. Their large eyes have over 4000 facets.
anatomy.zh: 它们拥有坚硬的、由重叠节段组成的甲壳和 14 条关节腿。它们巨大的眼睛有 4000 多个复眼面。

ecology_and_behavior.en: They are scavengers that eat dead fish on the ocean floor. They can survive for years without food in captivity.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 它们是清除者，吃海底的死鱼。在人工饲养环境下，它们甚至可以数年不吃东西也能生存。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Found in the deep waters of the Atlantic, Pacific, and Indian Oceans at depths of up to 2,100 meters.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 分布在大西洋、太平洋和印度洋的深海中，深度可达 2100 米。
